code: import React from'react';import axiosInstance from'../axiosConfig';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TaskList=_ref=>{let{tasks,setTasks,setEditingTask}=_ref;const handleDelete=async taskId=>{if(!window.confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this debate?"))return;try{await axiosInstance.delete(`/api/tasks/${taskId}`);setTasks(tasks.filter(task=>task._id!==taskId));}catch(error){alert('Failed to delete debate.');}};if(tasks.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-center text-slate-400 italic mt-10",children:"The debate hall is currently silent..."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"space-y-6",children:tasks.map(task=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex justify-between items-start",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 tracking-tight",children:task.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-slate-600 mt-2 leading-relaxed",children:task.description})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex space-x-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setEditingTask(task),className:"bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 p-2 px-4 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-200 transition font-semibold text-sm",children:"Edit"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleDelete(task._id),className:"bg-slate-800 text-white p-2 px-4 rounded-lg hover:bg-red-600 transition font-semibold text-sm",children:"Delete"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-50 flex items-center text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold",children:"Status: Active Discussion"})]},task._id))});};export default TaskList;
